critterGarden._doc: Adaptive pastoral theme for the Critter Garden example. Every stem is a looping instrument playing one track of the shared 8-bar C-major loop (assets/MIDI/critter-garden.mid), all locked to one downbeat. The game calls music.setIntensity(<vibe>) as the scene's mood changes; each vibe maps a stem name to an ABSOLUTE gain (0..1), and a stem absent from a vibe is silent in it. masterLevel scales the whole mix for headroom (many stems sum past 0 dBFS). Vibe meanings are in vibeDocs.

vibeDocs.calm: Idle garden — round bass, soft pad, a little marimba and the occasional bell. Lobby / waiting.
vibeDocs.lively: Critters are out — adds the flute melody and a shaker pulse over the bass and marimba.
vibeDocs.playful: Bouncy folk romp — marimba + flute + shaker forward with a light kick. Mid-energy, social.
vibeDocs.triumph: Big happy moment — every layer up, kick and bright synth lead driving. Win / climax.
